AddIpAddressGroupToIpAddressFamily.ipGroupId: The ID of the IP address family.
AddIpAddressGroupToIpAddressFamily.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
AddIpAddressGroupToIpAddressFamily.ipSetIds: IDs of the associated IP address groups. The ipVersion of each group must match the specified IP address family. Up to 5 IDs can be specified per request.
